wizardDescription: Contacts, blog, products, orders, coupons, pricing plans, gift cards, events, restaurants, bookings, groups, media, portfolio

setupFields.label: Site ID
setupFields.helpText: Find in your Wix dashboard URL after /dashboard/

setupFields.label: Site URL
setupFields.helpText: Your published Wix site URL (from browser address bar)

setup.instructions: 1. Go to dev.wix.com → API Keys → Generate API Key. 2. Copy your Site ID from the Wix dashboard URL. 3. After connecting, edit ~/API2File/wix/.api2file/adapter.json and set your wix-site-id in globals.headers.
